reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool but could not complete the task due to GitHub proxy authentication errors ("Bad credentials")
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub OAuth token appears to be invalid or expired. The agent successfully requested GitHub account access and executed multiple attempts to retrieve the authenticated user (Retry GitHub user endpoint, Source .env and call GitHub API, Verbose GitHub API call), but all attempts failed with "Bad credentials" errors from the GitHub proxy. The agent never successfully retrieved or reported the GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent application and agent list visible in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260427-053403-e7bh" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded with "idle" status displayed and message input box visible
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." in the message input — Message entered successfully in textbox
Clicked Send button — Message sent successfully; agent status changed to "working" and new session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created
Waited for Account Access Request card to appear — Card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access with GitHub already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Access granted; agent continued with "Get authenticated GitHub user" Bash tool
API Request Review card appeared asking to "Allow get the authenticated user?" for GitHub GET /user endpoint — Card displayed with Allow/Deny options
Clicked "Allow" button and selected "Allow Once" in permissions dialog — Permission granted and agent continued processing
Waited ~90 seconds for agent response — Another API Request Review appeared for "Retry GitHub user endpoint"
Clicked "Allow" and selected "Allow Once" again — Permission granted; agent continued
Waited ~90 seconds more — Another API Request appeared for "Verbose GitHub API call"
Clicked "Allow" and selected "Allow Once" — Permission granted

Waited ~45 seconds — Agent stopped showing "Working..." indicator and displayed "Waiting for input..." with message: "The GitHub proxy is returning 'Bad credentials' — the connected account's OAuth token appears invalid or expired. Could you reconnect the GitHub account?"
Another Account Access Request card appeared — GitHub account was checked again and "Allow Access (1)" button available
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" to try again — Agent resumed working
Waited additional 30 seconds — Agent returned to "needs input" status with another API Request Review for "Retry GitHub /user endpoint"
Clicked "Stop" button to halt the agent — Agent stopped after 4m 3s of execution
Took final screenshot — Confirmed agent is idle with "Worked for 4m 3s" displayed; no GitHub username was ever provided in agent response due to authentication failures
bugs: GitHub OAuth token appears to be invalid or expired. The agent successfully requested GitHub account access and executed multiple attempts to retrieve the authenticated user (Retry GitHub user endpoint, Source .env and call GitHub API, Verbose GitHub API call), but all attempts failed with "Bad credentials" errors from the GitHub proxy. The agent never successfully retrieved or reported the GitHub username.
